description: Multiple journal entries about sleep habits, asking for patterns

memory_chunks.content: Went to bed at midnight again. Woke up at 6am feeling groggy. I keep telling myself I'll go to bed earlier but then I end up scrolling my phone.
Actually slept 8 hours last night — went to bed at 10pm after cutting off screens at 9. Felt amazing in the morning. Why don't I do this every night?
Woke up three times last night. Too much coffee after 2pm I think. My sleep tracker shows my deep sleep was only 45 minutes total.
Trying the no-phone-after-9pm rule for a week. Day 2. It's harder than I expected but I did fall asleep faster.
Really tired today. Stayed up until 1am watching a show. Not worth it. My mood is noticeably worse when I get under 7 hours.

query: What patterns do you notice in my sleep habits?
